ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event will be held */,
  "organizing_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for organizing the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, celebration, gathering) */,
  "recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizing_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizing_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating or attendee capacity of the location */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that the attendee registered for */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "attendee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was made */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., registered, attended, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that the feedback pertains to */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the attendee */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coordinator, Manager) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_department" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "attendee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
